Genererad berättande text: StructureDefinition inera-ehds-lm-imaging-outcome

NamnFlaggorKard.TypBeskrivning & begränsningar
inera-ehds-lm-imaging-outcome 0..*BaseGetImagingOutcome
Instanser av denna logiska modell kan vara mål för en Reference
imagingOutcome 0..*BackboneElementBilddiagnostiskt resultat (ett per undersökning)
imagingOutcomeHeader 1..1BackboneElementPatientSummaryHeader
documentId 1..1stringDokumentets unika id
sourceSystemHSAId 1..1IdentifierKällsystemets HSA-id
documentTitle 0..1stringDokumentets titel
documentTime 0..1instantDokumentets tidpunkt
patientId 1..1IdentifierPatientens id
value 1..1stringPatientens personnummer/samordningsnummer
system 1..1uriOID för identifierartyp (t.ex. urn:oid:1.2.752.129.2.1.3.1)
accountableHealthcareProfessional 1..1BackboneElementAnsvarig hälso- och sjukvårdspersonal
authorTime 1..1instantTidpunkt
healthcareProfessionalHSAId 0..1IdentifierHSA-id
healthcareProfessionalName 0..1stringNamn
healthcareProfessionalRoleCode 0..1CodeableConceptYrkesroll
healthcareProfessionalOrgUnit 0..1BackboneElementOrg-enhet
orgUnitHSAId 0..1IdentifierOrgUnit HSA-id
orgUnitName 0..1stringOrgUnit namn
orgUnitTelecom 0..1stringTelefon
orgUnitEmail 0..1stringE-post
orgUnitAddress 0..1stringAdress
orgUnitLocation 0..1stringPlats
healthcareProfessionalCareUnitHSAId 0..1IdentifierVårdenhetens HSA-id
healthcareProfessionalCareGiverHSAId 0..1IdentifierVårdgivarens HSA-id
legalAuthenticator 0..1BackboneElementJuridiskt ansvarig
signatureTime 1..1instantSigneringstidpunkt
legalAuthenticatorHSAId 0..1IdentifierHSA-id
legalAuthenticatorName 0..1stringNamn
approvedForPatient 1..1booleanGodkänd för patientvisning
careContactId 0..1stringVårdkontaktid
nullified 0..1booleanMakulerad
nullifiedReason 0..1stringMakuleringsorsak
imagingOutcomeBody 1..1BackboneElementBilddiagnostisk information
examinationSpeciality 0..1CodeableConceptUndersökningsspecialitet
typeOfResult 1..1CodeableConceptTyp av resultat
resultTime 1..1instantResultatets tidpunkt
resultReport 1..1stringResultatrapport (fritext)
resultComment 0..1stringKommentar till resultatet
radiationDose 0..*QuantityStråldos
patientData 0..1BackboneElementPatientdata vid undersökningstillfälle
patientWeight 0..1QuantityPatientens vikt
patientLength 0..1QuantityPatientens längd
imageRecording 0..*BackboneElementBildtagning
recordingId 0..1IdentifierBildtagningens id
examinationActivity 1..1CodeableConceptUndersökningsaktivitet
examinationTimePeriod 1..1PeriodUndersökningsperiod
examinationStatus 0..1CodeableConceptUndersökningsstatus
examinationUnit 0..1stringUndersökningsenhet
accountableHealthcareProfessional 0..1BackboneElementAnsvarig personal
authorTime 1..1instantTidpunkt
healthcareProfessionalHSAId 0..1IdentifierHSA-id
healthcareProfessionalName 0..1stringNamn
healthcareProfessionalRoleCode 0..1CodeableConceptYrkesroll
healthcareProfessionalOrgUnit 0..1BackboneElementOrg-enhet
numberOfImages 0..1integerAntal bilder
modalityData 0..1BackboneElementModalitetsdata
typeOfModality 0..1stringModalitetstyp (t.ex. CT, MR)
manufacturer 0..1stringTillverkare
modelName 0..1stringModellnamn
equipmentId 0..1stringUtrustningens id
softwareVersion 0..1stringProgramvaruversion
imageDicomData 0..*BackboneElementDICOM-bilddata
dicomSOP 1..1IdentifierDICOM SOP (UID)
dicomValue 0..1base64BinaryDICOM binärdata
dicomReference 0..1urlReferens till DICOM-bild
imageStructuredData 0..*BackboneElementStrukturerad bilddata
aperture 0..1QuantityBländare
exposureTime 0..1QuantityExponeringstid
imageCreationTime 0..1instantBildskapningstidpunkt
bodyPartExamined 0..1CodeableConceptUndersökt kroppsdel
contrastAgentUsed 0..1stringKontrastmedel
magneticFieldStrength 0..1QuantityMagnetfältstyrka
copyright 0..1stringUpphovsrätt
imageData 1..1BackboneElementBilddata
mediaType 1..1CodeableConceptMedietyp
value 0..1base64BinaryBinär bild
reference 0..1urlReferens-URL
burnedInAnnotations 0..1booleanInbrända annotationer
referral 0..1BackboneElementKopplad remiss

anamnesis 0..1stringAnamnes
careContactId 0..1stringVårdkontaktid

Dokumentation för detta format

name: IneraEHDSLMImagingOutcome
title: GetImagingOutcome
description:
Logisk modell för tjänstekontraktet GetImagingOutcome
(RIV-TA urn:riv:clinicalprocess:healthcond:actoutcome:GetImagingOutcome:1).
Representerar responsens informationsstruktur — bilddiagnostiska resultat
för en patient. Baseras på NPÖ RIV 2.2.0-specifikation.

element.definition:
Logisk modell för tjänstekontraktet GetImagingOutcome
(RIV-TA urn:riv:clinicalprocess:healthcond:actoutcome:GetImagingOutcome:1).
Representerar responsens informationsstruktur — bilddiagnostiska resultat
för en patient. Baseras på NPÖ RIV 2.2.0-specifikation.

element.short: usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
element.comment: Applications can assume that an identifier is permanent unless it explicitly says that it is temporary.
element.requirements: Allows the appropriate identifier for a particular context of use to be selected from among a set of identifiers.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

element.isModifierReason: This is labeled as "Is Modifier" because applications should not mistake a temporary id for a permanent one.

binding.description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

element.definition: A coded type for the identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.
element.comment: This element deals only with general categories of identifiers.  It SHOULD not be used for codes that correspond 1..1 with the Identifier.system. Some identifiers may fall into multiple categories due to common usage.   Where the system is known, a type is unnecessary because the type is always part of the system definition. However systems often need to handle identifiers where the system is not known. There is not a 1:1 relationship between type and system, since many different systems have the same type.
element.requirements: Allows users to make use of identifiers when the identifier system is not known.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

binding.description: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

element.comment: Identifier.system is always case sensitive.
element.requirements: There are many sets  of identifiers.  To perform matching of two identifiers, we need to know what set we're dealing with. The system identifies a particular set of unique identifiers.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

element.comment: If the value is a full URI, then the system SHALL be urn:ietf:rfc:3986.  The value's primary purpose is computational mapping.  As a result, it may be normalized for comparison purposes (e.g. removing non-significant whitespace, dashes, etc.)  A value formatted for human display can be conveyed using the [Rendered Value extension](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-rendered-value.html). Identifier.value is to be treated as case sensitive unless knowledge of the Identifier.system allows the processer to be confident that non-case-sensitive processing is safe.

mapping.map: II.extension or II.root if system indicates OID or GUID (Or Role.id.extension or root)

element.short: Time period when id is/was valid for use
element.definition: Time period during which identifier is/was valid for use.

element.short: Organization that issued id (may be just text)
element.comment: The Identifier.assigner may omit the .reference element and only contain a .display element reflecting the name or other textual information about the assigning organization.

element.definition:
Logisk modell för tjänstekontraktet GetImagingOutcome
(RIV-TA urn:riv:clinicalprocess:healthcond:actoutcome:GetImagingOutcome:1).
Representerar responsens informationsstruktur — bilddiagnostiska resultat
för en patient. Baseras på NPÖ RIV 2.2.0-specifikation.
Regel 1: Används för spärrhantering och åtkomstkontroll.
Regel 1: Används för spärrhantering och åtkomstkontroll.
Kodas enligt TypeOfResultCodeEnum. Se QUESTIONS.md ASSUME-003.
